rationale: Educ. Code §45.109 governs ISD contracts for athletic facilities and maintenance tax elections. It does not reference homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b), so no direct conflict exists.
quote: The consideration for a contract under this section may be paid from any source available to the independent school district.
_note: No direct statutory conflict. Indirect fiscal pressure on ISD maintenance tax capacity is a budgetary concern, not a legal conflict with this section.
